CustomField.description: EXAMPLE level date field (per the "N date fields" design, D2). Close Date of the gift that pushed this donor's Total Giving over the Congressional threshold this year. When a new level is added, an admin adds a matching Date_Achieved_<Level>__c field and extends the level automation. JSI-90 / Jason Ott.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Date the donor reached the Congressional level this year (auto-stamped).
CustomField.label: Date Achieved — Congressional
